domains.name: Deploy ArcGIS Enterprise
objectives: Apply Esri guidelines to install and configure an ArcGIS Enterprise deployment
Apply Esri best practices to configure security for ArcGIS Enterprise
Apply procedural concepts to authorize ArcGIS Enterprise
Determine the appropriate ArcGIS Server roles
Determine the appropriate ArcGIS Data Store types
Explain how to configure ArcGIS Enterprise portal organization settings

domains.name: Troubleshoot ArcGIS Enterprise
objectives: Troubleshoot functional issues between ArcGIS Enterprise components
Interpret ArcGIS Enterprise logs to determine the causes of issues

domains.name: Maintain and Support ArcGIS Enterprise
objectives: Determine how to perform system health checks and maintain stability
Apply best practices to conduct backups and restorations
Apply procedural concepts to optimize services
Apply Esri guidelines to upgrade ArcGIS Enterprise

domains.name: Manage Content and Users in ArcGIS Enterprise
objectives: Explain how to configure service capabilities and properties to meet user requirements
Explain how to register on-premises or cloud-based data sources with ArcGIS Enterprise
Explain how to manage groups and content
Explain how to set up and manage distributed collaborations
